supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on anchor tenants to attract customers; dependence on tenant creditworthiness and ability to pay rent
supply_chain.risks: Tenant bankruptcies; loss of anchor stores or major tenants; supply chain disruptions affecting tenants' inventory delivery; labor shortages affecting tenants

regulatory_risks: Changes in government policies and applicable laws and regulations, including tax, environmental, safety and zoning
Failure to maintain Simon's REIT status could result in federal corporate income taxes
Compliance with REIT requirements may limit ability to pursue certain business opportunities
Changes in tax laws or regulations that result in adverse tax consequences
Environmental liabilities for contamination at properties
Compliance with federal, state and local environmental regulations
Violations of anti-bribery, anti-corruption and international trade laws (U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, U.K. Bribery Act)
Changes in applicable laws and regulations in foreign jurisdictions
Political inefficiencies and changes in government policies in international markets
Regulatory fines or penalties related to AI use and data protection
Inconsistent interpretation or application of AI-related regulations

sanction_risks: Foreign debt crisis affecting international operations
War in Ukraine affecting economic conditions
Conflict in Israel, Gaza and surrounding areas
